subject: Weekly digest: ragdoll track in Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q2 review | INIT-4557
body: Following yesterday's call, the ragdoll effort in Canberra needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Mahatma Gandhi seems to disagree with Nikola Tesla on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-4557. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
